content: It was very informative and also had some interactive exhibits. I'd suggest making a visit! Staff is very friendly and it's free.

title: Museum of the Eye®   - American Academy of Ophthalmology
content: Close up of iris and museum of the eye logo. **Welcome to the Truhlsen-Marmor Museum of the Eye®**. Find out at the American Academy of Ophthalmology Truhlsen-Marmor Museum of the Eye. The world’s only free, public museum dedicated to the fascinating science of sight. Learn about our location and accessibility. Support the museum or add to our collection.
